findings.message: marketplace.json description for huggingface-community-evals directly contradicts the skill's own stated scope boundary
marketplace.json description for huggingface-datasets references a 'parquetlens' tool that does not exist anywhere in the actual skill
marketplace.json description for huggingface-vision-trainer omits SAM/SAM2 segmentation training, which the actual SKILL.md dedicates roughly a third of its content to
Documented install instruction pipes curl output from the first-party hf.co domain directly into bash
Documented install instruction pipes curl output from the first-party huggingface GitHub org directly into sh

Three vague quantifiers without measurable criteria

References nonexistent skills `hugging-face-jobs` and `hugging-face-model-trainer` in the Related Skills section (also lines 246, 363) — grepped skills/ for a directory matching *jobs* or *model-trainer*; zero matches across all 19 skill directories, so the skill named `hugging-face-jobs` and `hugging-face-model-trainer` referenced here do not exist

References the nonexistent `hugging-face-jobs` skill for the Token Usage Guide — same verification as huggingface-vision-trainer/SKILL.md: no `hugging-face-jobs` skill directory exists anywhere in the repo

References nonexistent skill `hugging-face-jobs` for remote/Jobs execution hand-off — grepped skills/ for a directory matching *jobs*; zero matches; six separate hand-off instructions (lines 24, 53, 67, 147, 182, 192) all point to this nonexistent skill
References nonexistent skill `hugging-face-jobs` in the remote-execution example — same verification as huggingface-community-evals/SKILL.md; lines 20 and 101 both reference the nonexistent skill

marketplace.json description for huggingface-community-evals directly contradicts the skill's own stated scope boundary — marketplace.json says the skill adds eval results to model cards and imports Artificial Analysis scores; skills/huggingface-community-evals/SKILL.md states verbatim 'It does not cover: ... model-card or model-index edits ... Artificial Analysis imports ... PR creation or community-evals automation'

marketplace.json description for huggingface-datasets references a 'parquetlens' tool that does not exist anywhere in the actual skill — repo-wide search for 'parquetlens' matches only marketplace.json and the generated README.md table; skills/huggingface-datasets/SKILL.md documents `hf datasets sql` (DuckDB via the hf CLI) instead and never mentions parquetlens
marketplace.json description for huggingface-vision-trainer omits SAM/SAM2 segmentation training, which the actual SKILL.md dedicates roughly a third of its content to
Documented install instruction pipes curl output from the first-party hf.co domain directly into bash — line 6: 'Install: curl -LsSf https://hf.co/cli/install.sh | bash -s'

Documented install instruction pipes curl output from the first-party huggingface GitHub org directly into sh — line 225: 'Install: curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huggingface/hf-mount/main/install.sh | sh'
Duplicate reference to the curl|bash hf CLI installer one-liner — line 9 repeats the same hf.co/cli/install.sh | bash -s one-liner documented in skills/hf-cli/SKILL.md
Five vague quantifiers without measurable criteria — grep count of vague-quantifier list terms across the file: 5 occurrences (lines 302, 315, 321, 519, 602)
